title: USGS Mineral Resources
description: A USGS source card about minerals, materials, supply chains, maps, and economic geology.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS mineral resources explain where important materials come from, how they are measured, and why minerals matter for technology, infrastructure, and trade.
Use this source for cross-curricular reading that connects geology with economics, engineering, environmental questions, and everyday products.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
